description_long: This is a modern, minimalist chair constructed primarily from light-colored wood, featuring a gently curved seat and backrest for ergonomic comfort. The backrest is broad and slightly reclined, attached to the seat with visible fasteners that add a subtle industrial touch. The seat is wide and flat, with rounded edges and four visible mounting points. The chair stands on four straight, slightly angled legs, providing stability and a clean silhouette. There are no armrests, emphasizing its simple and functional design. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the chair a natural and warm appearance suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A minimalist wooden chair with a curved backrest, flat seat, and four angled legs, finished in light wood grain. It has a clean, modern look with visible fasteners and no armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved backrest, flat seat, and four angled legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gentle curve of the backrest and the flat, slightly contoured seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad backrest, rear leg structure, and connecting support bar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the seat and backrest curvature.
